name: omni-studio
description: AI video generation with Gemini Omni (Vertex AI)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.vercel-build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
